author: Zhang Zhang
description: Sync text, webpages, audio, and files from a WeChat mini program inbox into your vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Zhang Zhang
manifest.description: Sync text, webpages, audio, and files from a WeChat mini program inbox into your vault.
manifest.name: WeChat Inbox Sync

name: WeChat Inbox Sync

releases.author: mingjuner123-spec
releases.description:
WeChat Inbox Sync 1.1.20

- 修复安装器生成的 Windows transcribe.ps1 缺少 ConvertTo-NativeArgument 的问题。
- 保留远程最新安装器、native 进程调用和 UTF-8 转写修复。

releases.author: mingjuner123-spec
releases.description:
WeChat Inbox Sync 1.1.16

- 修复 Windows 本地转写把 whisper 正常 stderr 日志误判为失败的问题。
- 旧本地转写脚本会提示重新安装/更新本地转写组件。

releases.author: mingjuner123-spec
releases.description: Release 1.0.16: multi-device binding update and binding error fix.

releases.author: mingjuner123-spec
releases.description: Fix Xiaohongshu short-link extraction by retrying redirect resolution with GET when HEAD is blocked.

releases.author: mingjuner123-spec
releases.description: Widen Obsidian compatibility so older desktop clients can discover and install the plugin.

releases.author: mingjuner123-spec
releases.description: Fix external tutorial opening and publish the latest plugin package assets.

releases.author: mingjuner123-spec
releases.description: Persist long Doubao ASR jobs and improve Bilibili audio fallback.

releases.author: mingjuner123-spec
releases.description: Fix Bilibili playurl audio fallback and keep long ASR jobs retryable instead of writing failed notes.

releases.author: mingjuner123-spec
releases.description: Update social audio transcript extraction and local ASR helper.

releases.author: mingjuner123-spec
releases.description: Release WeChat Inbox Sync 1.0.5. Removes duplicated article title/share text from forwarded webpage Markdown output.

releases.author: mingjuner123-spec
releases.description: Release WeChat Inbox Sync 1.0.4. Deduplicates Xiaohongshu image note assets by stable image IDs and filters JSON noise from note text.

releases.author: mingjuner123-spec
releases.description: Release WeChat Inbox Sync 1.0.3. Handles WeChat article captcha pages gracefully and improves Xiaohongshu image note extraction.

releases.author: mingjuner123-spec
releases.description: Release 1.0.2: fixes plugin loading diagnostics, sync ribbon icon, Xiaohongshu/PDF extraction, and clearer sync API guidance.
releases.name: WeChat Inbox Sync 1.0.2

releases.author: mingjuner123-spec
releases.description: Add one-device binding validation and clearer bind setup flow.

releases.author: mingjuner123-spec
releases.description: Initial release of WeChat Inbox Sync.
